action.reasoning: Observation: The baseline GWNet achieved mae_60min of 3.9954. Analysis: The model can be further improved by using the full GWNet architecture (8 layers with dilations 1,2,4,8,1,2,4,8), adding forward and backward random walk transition matrices, and training for more epochs (40) with a MultiStepLR scheduler. I will also add AMP (Automatic Mixed Precision) to speed up training. Decision: Update model.py, train.py, and predict.py with these improvements, train for 40 epochs, and submit for evaluation.
